nodes.label: Task-Driven Implementation
nodes.author: openspec
nodes.rationale: Implementation proceeds through pending tasks with minimal changes, immediate checkbox updates, and pauses for ambiguity or blockers.

nodes.label: Archive Validation
nodes.author: openspec
nodes.rationale: Artifact completion, task completion, and delta-spec sync state are assessed before preserving the change in the archive.

nodes.label: Spec Conflict Resolution
nodes.author: openspec
nodes.rationale: Conflicting delta specs are resolved using implementation evidence; implemented changes are applied chronologically when both exist.

nodes.label: Thinking, Not Implementation
nodes.author: openspec
nodes.rationale: Explore mode permits investigation and artifact capture but prohibits application-code implementation so assumptions and options can be examined first.

nodes.label: Intelligent Delta Spec Merge
nodes.author: openspec
nodes.rationale: Delta specs represent intent rather than wholesale replacement, allowing partial scenario additions while preserving unrelated main-spec content.

nodes.label: Permanent Rasterized Redaction
nodes.rationale: Outputs are rebuilt from rasterized pages with opaque rectangles to remove text layers, metadata, annotations, attachments, and forms.

nodes.label: Checkpointed Sequential Processing
nodes.rationale: Pages are processed sequentially and checkpointed to bound memory and recover from Fargate Spot interruptions.

nodes.label: Serverless AWS Architecture
nodes.rationale: Static hosting, a serverless control plane, Fargate Spot, and no NAT Gateway are selected to keep expected monthly operating cost below EUR 25.

nodes.label: Reproducible governance controls before application code
nodes.author: @AlkaSaliss
nodes.norm_label: reproducible governance controls before application code

nodes.label: Official AWS ECS regional price index
nodes.norm_label: official aws ecs regional price index

nodes.label: No Application or Infrastructure Runtime Implementation
nodes.norm_label: no application or infrastructure runtime implementation
